element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Enables access to initial areas and puzzle solutions
Required for defeating bosses and enemies
Solves environmental puzzles and unlocks new areas
Helps player orient in complex interconnected world
Resource gathering for survival and life gauge expansion
Permanent life gauge upgrades unlock deeper exploration
Defeating bosses rescues dinosaurs and opens new paths

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Non-linear exploration-driven with gating through item acquisition and boss defeats; tension emerges from map complexity and resource management rather than linear stage progression

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Side paths and alternative routes accessed through item possession and puzzle solving
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Climbing trees and entering doors as hidden/optional interaction points

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction to movement and environmental interaction; safe exploration with light enemy pressure
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Item-gated progression increases complexity; puzzle-solving becomes critical path; boss encounters introduce combat challenge
difficulty_curve.late_game: Convergence of multiple item requirements for access; boss encounters increase in difficulty; navigation complexity peaks
notable_spikes: First boss encounter marks transition from exploration to combat
Multi-item requirement puzzles create gate spikes
Boss battles present distinct difficulty jumps tied to dinosaur rescue gates

notable_level_patterns.description: Complex scrolling map replacing traditional stage-based progression; areas connect with no explicitly separated stages, requiring navigation and backtracking
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Entire game world functions as single connected region

notable_level_patterns.description: Access to new areas locked behind possession of specific items and successful boss defeats; player must seek items and abilities to unlock paths
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Water gun required for specific puzzle areas; dinosaur rescue opens new paths

notable_level_patterns.description: Game features multi-functional items that serve both combat and world-interaction purposes; progression unlocks new exploration capabilities
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Compass/3D map provides navigation aid; water gun solves puzzles and potentially combat
